items.claim: Richey has strong anti-grappling skills that prevent opponents from successfully setting up takedowns.
items.quote: She does have pretty good anti-grappling. Fighters who have needed to take her down just haven't gotten the space to set it up too well.

items.claim: Klain utilizes high-level footwork and stance switching that resembles Lomachenko's style.
items.quote: Klein in a way if I had to draw a comparison kind of fights like Lomachenko with the style of footwork.

items.claim: Chase Hooper has poor distance management on the feet, leading him to run into the pocket recklessly.
items.quote: His biggest issue is that on the feet his distance management is terrible. Even in his older fights he'll just run into the pocket recklessly and get clipped quite a bit.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez lacks defensive soundness and does not have effective takedown defense.
items.quote: The biggest issue he's not really defensively sound anywheres anywhere. Uh he doesn't have takedown defense or really any way of evading strikes

items.claim: Farid Bakhshiyan suffers from a combination of low power and poor cardio, causing him to lose the third round consistently.
items.quote: for some reason he has a weird combination of just not enough power and no cardio... he also always loses round three.

items.claim: Christian Leroy Duncan's reliance on dynamic, spinning techniques makes his offense predictable and easier to evade.
items.quote: he makes that his main skill set, which makes it a lot easier to evade because you can anticipate it very easily.

items.claim: Jared Cannonier's striking defense is poor, as he relies on outgunning opponents rather than technical evasion.
items.quote: His defense on the feet is very questionable. He just relies on being to outgun his opponent, but because of that he's gotten rocked in like pretty much all of his last fights.

items.claim: Kamaru Usman's striking ability has degraded, showing less nuance and defensive soundness than in the past.
items.quote: His striking really seems to have degraded a lot. There's no real nuance now, and he's not as defensively sound.
